title: blepharis obtusisepala
intro: Blepharis obtusisepala, also known as the rough leafed blepharis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to Africa and has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Blepharis obtusisepala plant are often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
